description_long: This object is a ground-mounted solar panel array, elevated on a single sturdy pole anchored into a concrete base set on a patch of grass. The array consists of a rectangular grid of photovoltaic panels, each with a dark blue-black surface and a visible grid pattern of cells, framed by a metallic border. The supporting pole is metallic and robust, designed to withstand outdoor conditions, and is centrally positioned beneath the panel array. The concrete base provides stability and is partially embedded in the ground, ensuring the structure remains upright and secure. The solar panel array is tilted at an angle, optimizing exposure to sunlight, and the underside reveals a supporting frame structure. No visible electrical cabling or inverter components are apparent from any angle.
description: A ground-mounted, pole-supported solar panel array with a rectangular grid of dark photovoltaic panels, anchored on a concrete base over grass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular face of the solar panel array, the supporting pole, and the concrete base on grass.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tilt angle of the solar panel array and the thickness of the panel structure, with the pole and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the panel array, the supporting frame, and the pole, with the concrete base centered below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tilt and edge profile of the solar panel array, with the supporting pole and base visible.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30 degrees, facing forward (likely south), orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: pole-mounted, ground-mounted with a steel or aluminum pole anchored in a concrete base
